name: Application of the quantum Fourier transform in a harmonic balance solver for Burgers' equation - ScienceDirect
snippet: A harmonic balance solver is developed for Burgers' equation, in which discrete Fourier transforms are approximated using a hybrid quantum-classical algorithm.
